definition: Top-of-book depth in Mag-7 has declined ~40-60% since 2019 despite rising volume, creating an appearance of liquidity that evaporates under stress. Combined with 0DTE options creating concentrated negative gamma (daily notional >$1T), market-makers must sell into declining prices during stress.
evidence: Top-of-book depth in Mag-7 declined ~40-60% since 2019
0DTE daily notional >$1T creating concentrated negative gamma
Market-makers hedging short gamma must sell into declines
open_questions: Whether 0DTE gamma effects are large enough to trigger cross-asset cascades
Interaction between declining depth and passive rebalancing flows
